title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Schoolnet India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Schoolnet India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Schoolnet India Advisory Limited family as a Curriculum Developer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Schoolnet India Advisory Limited:
Schoolnet India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India Advisory Limited!
